children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out sections 10401 through 10412 of this title, $175,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015.

children.heading: Reservation of funds
children.label: i Reservation of funds
children.text: For any fiscal year for which the amounts appropriated under paragraph (1) exceed $130,000,000, not less than 25 percent of such excess funds shall be made available to carry out .section 10412 of this title

children.heading: Formula grants
children.label: ii Formula grants
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated under paragraph (1) for a fiscal year and not reserved under clause (i), not less than 70 percent shall be used for making grants under .section 10406(a) of this title

children.heading: Grants to tribes
children.label: B Grants to tribes
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated under paragraph (1) for a fiscal year and not reserved under subparagraph (A)(i), not less than 10 percent shall be used to carry out .section 10409 of this title

children.heading: Technical assistance and training centers
children.label: C Technical assistance and training centers
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated under paragraph (1) for a fiscal year and not reserved under subparagraph (A)(i), not less than 6 percent shall be used by the Secretary for making grants under .section 10410 of this title

children.heading: Grants for State Domestic Violence Coalitions
children.label: D Grants for State Domestic Violence Coalitions
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated under paragraph (1) for a fiscal year and not reserved under subparagraph (A)(i), not less than 10 percent of such amounts shall be used by the Secretary for making grants under .section 10411 of this title

children.heading: Administration, evaluation and monitoring
children.label: E Administration, evaluation and monitoring
children.text: Of the amount appropriated under paragraph (1) for a fiscal year and not reserved under subparagraph (A)(i), not more than 2.5 percent shall be used by the Secretary for evaluation, monitoring, and other administrative costs under this chapter.

children.heading: National domestic violence hotline
children.label: b National domestic violence hotline
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out $3,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015.section 10413 of this title

children.heading: Domestic Violence Prevention Enhancement and Leadership Through Alliances
children.label: c Domestic Violence Prevention Enhancement and Leadership Through Alliances
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out $6,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2015.section 10414 of this title
